rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for description and type.

rows.description: Stipula Due Rectoris Scholae et Off.
rows.notes: Based on `gemini-flash` but corrected 'Stipend' to 'Stipula' based on visual verification of the 'l' character, and 'Scholae' from 'Schole'. `gpt-5-mini`'s description ('Statuta Dno. Victoriæ Schol. et Off.') was significantly different and visually less accurate. Both correctly identified as header with no amounts.
rows.section_header: Stipula Due Rectoris Scholae et Off.

rows.notes: Based on `gemini-flash`. Visual verification confirms 'Ad — ad Fest. L. Mich.' and its observation of the faint/obscured '---'. `gpt-5-mini`'s description 'Ditto ad Est. P. Mich.' is visually incorrect. Amounts are clear and match across both extractors.

rows.notes: Visual verification required. `gpt-5-mini` correctly identified this as an entry with amounts (33 0 0), whereas `gemini-flash` incorrectly marked it as a header with no amounts. Corrected description from `gpt-5-mini` (which had 'Test.' and incorrectly included '1838') to 'Stipend ad Fest. Annun.' based on direct image reading; the '1838' is not on this line.
